response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or secure embedded systems, with most recent roles focused on web, Node.js, and DLang — not the core C++/STL/multi-threaded systems required. While they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, there is no evidence of recent or deep expertise in secure development, IEC 62443, message brokers, or industrial protocols critical to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven track record in open-source and community-driven technical projects
Excellent communication and mentoring skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9 years
Lacks demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
No evidence of hands-on work with message brokers, multi-threaded systems, or cloud-native industrial platforms
